name: aicf-agent-skills
description: Reusable Agent Skills for building, auditing, testing, migrating, and releasing AI Capability Framework projects.

interface.shortDescription: Build governed, testable AICF capability systems with coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Agent Skills for authoring AICF capabilities, integrating runtime handlers, writing evals, red-teaming, validating provider adapters, and releasing public AICF projects safely.
defaultPrompt: Use AICF Agent Skills to author a new governed AI capability.
Use AICF Agent Skills to migrate this AI tool to AICF.
Use AICF Agent Skills to add evals and red-team tests for this capability.
